parameters.jsCode:
const b = $input.first().json;

const ctaLine = b.include_cta === false
  ? '- include_cta: false (no promotion)'
  : (b.include_cta === true ? '- include_cta: true (soft CTA OK)' : '- include_cta: contextual (decide based on platform)');

const prompt = [
  'BRIEF:',
  `- platform: ${b.platform}`,
  `- persona: ${b.persona}`,
  `- framework: ${b.framework}`,
  `- language: ${b.language}`,
  `- topic: ${b.topic}`,
  `- length_hint: ${b.length_hint}`,
  ctaLine,
  b.subreddit ? `- subreddit: r/${b.subreddit}` : null,
  b.recipient_name ? `- recipient_name: ${b.recipient_name}` : null,
  b.context ? `- context: ${b.context}` : null,
  '',
  `Produce ${b.variants > 1 ? b.variants + ' distinct variants' : '1 variant'} of copy for the brief above.`,
  b.variants > 1
    ? 'Output JSON ONLY: {"variants": [{"text": "...", "hashtags": ["..."]}, ...]}'
    : 'Output the copy text only, no preamble, no markdown fences.'
].filter(Boolean).join('\n');

return [{ json: { ...b, prompt } }];
